ShortDescription.Value: Reveal invisible networks and markers whenever you need to work around them.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Show Invisible Networks
Invisible paths are useful for custom layouts, but they can be difficult to work around after they are placed. This mod lets you reveal them when adding surfaces, areas, or other details so you can see exactly where the paths are.
## Features - Toggle invisible networks and markers at any time - Tool options panel button - Rebindable keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+M by default) - Options menu toggle - Persistent visibility setting
## Controls Use the Invisible Networks button in the tool options panel, press Ctrl+M, or use the toggle in the Options menu.
## Requirements - Extra Networks and Areas - Unified Icon Library
## Known behavior The mod uses the game's global marker visibility flag. It can therefore reveal vanilla markers, spawners, points, and other marker entities in addition to Extra Networks and Areas paths.
